list.title: Theatre
list.description: Flagship productions fusing live music, movement, narrative, and projection. Our theatre work explores migration, identity, belonging, and spirituality — often selling out within hours.

list.title: Intimate Concerts
list.description: Acoustic, storytelling-driven community gatherings in intimate downtown spaces. Deeply personal live sessions designed to restore connection — small rooms, big feelings.

list.title: Digital Storytelling
list.description: Original films, cultural mapping, and digital content that create an exchange between the diaspora and the homeland. Where art becomes documentation and documentation becomes art.
